query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure playing a red upright bass on a dimly lit stage with a music stand visible in the foreground and streaks of stage lighting in the background against a deep blue-purple backdrop.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred musician playing a red upright bass on stage, with extreme streaking across the entire frame causing the figure, instrument, and music stand to dissolve into flowing smears of color; cool blue and purple stage lighting mixes unevenly with warm streaks of white and amber light, producing an abstract composition where subjects become unrecognizable gestures of color and motion.
